summary: Removed neovim-specific content from ~30 core .claude/context/ files, making the agent system generic and portable. Fixed corruption artifacts, deleted deprecated routing.md, replaced project-overview with generic template, and generalized all example data.

completion_data.completion_summary: Removed neovim-specific content from ~30 core .claude/context/ files. Fixed corruption artifacts, deleted deprecated routing.md, replaced project-overview with generic template, and generalized all routing tables and example data to use extension placeholders.
completion_data.claudemd_suggestions: Updated ~30 files in .claude/context/ to remove neovim-specific references. Replaced routing tables, agent names, file paths, and task type enumerations with generic extension patterns. Added project-overview.md to .syncprotect. No CLAUDE.md changes needed -- it already uses generic patterns.
